name: Hôtel de Crillon, A Rosewood Hotel
senseOfPlace: 18th-century palace turned Rosewood. Karl Lagerfeld suites, Les Ambassadeurs, Sense spa. Restraint and craft — no imposed Rosewood template; the building leads. Marie Antoinette's piano lessons, Hemingway's letters, modern haute couture next door.

amenityOptions.name: Macarons, single flight
amenityOptions.story: Hermé's atelier two blocks from the property; same morning batch

amenityOptions.name: Champagne demi — grower estate
amenityOptions.story: Small-grower Champagne — what Parisians drink when no one is watching

amenityOptions.name: Le Pain Quotidien tartine board
amenityOptions.story: Belgian-Parisian breakfast institution — quiet, communal table register

amenityOptions.name: Yann Couvreur dark chocolate bonbons
amenityOptions.story: Couvreur's atelier in the 11e; the artisan pastry voice of contemporary Paris

amenityOptions.name: Du Pain et des Idées pastry box
amenityOptions.source: Du Pain et des Idées, 10e arrondissement
amenityOptions.story: Escargot pistache and pain des amis from Christophe Vasseur's lauded boulangerie

amenityOptions.name: Maison Plisson seasonal preserves
amenityOptions.story: The grocer-restaurant Parisians treat as a private pantry

signatureExperiences.title: Private morning at Musée d'Orsay
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Pre-opening access via Rosewood Placemaker; 8 min from property

signatureExperiences.title: Dinner at Les Ambassadeurs
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Restored Marie-Antoinette dining room; pescatarian tasting on request

signatureExperiences.title: Marais antique scarves with curator
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Rue Vieille du Temple ateliers; a haute couture archivist guides

signatureExperiences.title: Seine sunrise barge breakfast
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Private barge between Pont Neuf and Pont des Arts; first light over the bridges

signatureExperiences.title: Palais Garnier rehearsal access
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Working rehearsal at the Opéra; the back-of-house view

signatureExperiences.title: Père Lachaise literary walk
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Wilde, Proust, Colette — a guided walk among the writers who chose this city

signatureExperiences.title: Pierre Hermé private pastry course
signatureExperiences.whyHere: Two-block walk; a one-pastry class with a senior pâtissier

placemakers.name: Inès Marchand
placemakers.bio: Curator-trained Parisian guide; arranges pre-opening visits and atelier tours.

placemakers.name: Claire Beaudouin
placemakers.bio: Sorbonne-trained art historian; private gallery and atelier walks with patient depth.
